description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the rust:latest Docker image and a variable CARGO_HOME set to $CI_PROJECT_DIR/.cargo. Define a single build stage and a run-build job that runs in the build stage, uses the rust:latest image, caches the $CARGO_HOME and target/ directories, and is limited to the master branch. The job script should first execute 'rustc --version && cargo --version' then run 'cargo build --release --jobs 1'.
